shared_case_surface: memo recall cases that keep explicit inspect-capsule-expand read paths, provenance-thread or stronger-source posture, lifecycle honesty, and thin-grounding escalation reviewable on the same bounded consumer surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same memo-recall integrity question, keeps the read path explicit, and still covers inspect-over-expand precision, provenance-thread visibility, stale-or-withdrawn lifecycle honesty, stronger-source escalation under thin grounding, and compact-surface false-authority pressure without turning the bundle into contradiction handling, permission inference, or broad memory-quality grading.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect the read path and recalled memo surface directly
provenance-thread or stronger-source posture remains visible during compact recall
stale, superseded, or retracted memory remains visibly non-current
stronger-source escalation stays reviewable when memo grounding is too thin
